summary: Full audit of TapIn codebase. Critical: (1) recurringClasses collection has no Firestore rules — all recurring ops fail in prod; (2) classes delete rule allows isTrainerOrAbove but DEC-005 restricts to head_trainer only. High: Firebase credentials hardcoded; auth failure silently swallowed with console.error; zero tests. Medium: any types in mapClass/mapRecurringClass lack justification comments; FAB shadow hardcoded instead of shadows.lg. Low: micro-spacing values (3-4px) hardcoded in ClassCard, WeeklyScheduleScreen, LoginScreen.
